### Previous meeting {#previous-meeting .unnumbered}

#### Plan for the summer vacation

- In order to avoid the lack of communication during the summer, book
 > a meeting with others and keep everyone updated about your
 > progress before you start the vacation.

- Ziqi: Summer vacation from June 26th to July 14th

#### Plan for the future development

- **Teodora:** continue to optimize the visualization functions. -
 > DONE

- **Ziqi:** update the cell type description table for STELLAR and
 > test the visualization functions on the STELLAR dataset.

 - Rename cell types - DONE

 - Remove some unnecessary markers - DONE

 - Fetch visualization functions from dev and test - DONE

- **Ziqi:** Upload the STELLAR dataset to farkkila datacloud. - DONE

- **Together:** Discuss the threshold for the undefined cell types, by
 > comparing the Tribus result with reference cell types of STELLAR
 > and TMA datasets.

- **Together:** Continue to find potential CyTOF datasets. Add your
 > suggestions here:
 > [[https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ljiXV2-yLx-6zpvvhKWFJHJOZWSSNoMNOAccgGkuPhc/edit?usp=share_link]{.underline}](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ljiXV2-yLx-6zpvvhKWFJHJOZWSSNoMNOAccgGkuPhc/edit?usp=share_link) -
 > Ziqi found 2 papers

- **Change the plan made on March 31st:** Instead of pre&post dataset

om/spreadsheets/d/1ljiXV2-yLx-6zpvvhKWFJHJOZWSSNoMNOAccgGkuPhc/edit?usp=share_link) -
 > Ziqi found 2 papers

- **Change the plan made on March 31st:** Instead of pre&post dataset
 > quality assessment, use Fernando's dataset as the main analysis
 > for the manuscript. (Will have a meeting with Fernando on April
 > 21st) - Already meet with Fer, Fer will tidy up his dataset before
 > the Boston internship

### Outline for today's meeting {#outline-for-todays-meeting .unnumbered}

#### Ziqi

- Working on cell typing for the 1st Level: Stromal/Epi/Immune

- Question about the STELLAR dataset:

 - Cell type levels are divided according to:
 > [[https://www.biorxiv.org/content/biorxiv/early/2021/11/25/2021.11.25.469203/F1.large.jpg]{.underline}](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/biorxiv/early/2021/11/25/2021.11.25.469203/F1.large.jpg)

 - **Can't identify Immune cells, need help with logic gate
 > design**

 - **Divide immune cells into lym/Mye**

 - ![](media/image1.png){width="4.463093832020998in"
 > height="3.9218755468066493in"}

 - Ziqi's understanding of how Tribus work:

 - Tribus will only use the markers included in the logic gate
 > (only if the marker has -1 or +1 to certain cell types)

 - **Idea: In order to improve cell typing accuracy, we
 > should carefully** **pick the markers that contribute
 > more to the variance.**

r has -1 or +1 to certain cell types)

 - **Idea: In order to improve cell typing accuracy, we
 > should carefully** **pick the markers that contribute
 > more to the variance.**

 - Thus Ziqi plots histograms for each marker to check
 > the distributions. See in Jupyter notebook.

 - SOM will return a large number of clusters

 - SOM clusters will be assigned a name according to the marker
 > expression characteristic & the logic table

 - Could you explain more about the scoring function for
 > the cluster **"score_nodes"** in classify.py?

 - See in slide 03.31

 - Please correct any misunderstanding!

- About NKI data: Currently not available, asked Fer. Should be ready
 > before Fer leaves for his summer internship.

- About CyTOF dataset: 2 papers in the shared Google sheet

#### Teo 

- Introduce newly developed functions/parameters.

- Visualization functions work perfectly!

- Data normalization

 - Now z-score was added, should we consider log-scaled?

#### **Read through the manuscript meeting notes together (on March 31st) Next time!**

- What is finished? What is ongoing? What should be done?
